subject: Add hover lift to primary and outline CTA buttons per design spec
description: Design guidelines Button primary: `hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300`. Our accent variant has this lift but primary and outline variants don't. Add `hover:-translate-y-0.5` to the primary variant in button.jsx (line 13). The outline variant should also get lift when used as a CTA (share button on campaign page). This makes buttons feel more interactive and matches the design reference showcase.
